docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, WILLIAM
ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF SC-108 FILED IN CSM-25-870061 PER VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FONTES, TONYA $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,325.00, THIS AMENDED JUDGMENT CORRECTS A CLERICAL ERROR IN THE JUDGMENT FILED ON AUGUST 13, 2025. NUNC PRO TUNC TO AUGUST 13, 2025. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER TO PRODUCE STATEMENT OF ASSETS AND TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT FONTES, TONYA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,200.00 FILED BY WONG, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT FONTES, TONYA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $75.00 SERVED JUL-07-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FONTES, TONYA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-13-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-13-2025 VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF WILLIAM WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TONYA FONTES IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-13-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, WILLIAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FONTES, TONYA PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MET HER BURDEN OF PROOF. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT FONTES, TONYA HEARING SET FOR SEP-03-2026 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
